mapper.sql: select r.reader_id, r.reader_name, r.reader_code, r.reader_type, r.ip_addr, r.install_position, r.chute_id, c.chute_name, r.dept_id, d.dept_name, r.status, r.del_flag, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark from device_reader r left join device_chute c on c.chute_id = r.chute_id left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = r.dept_id
mapper.insert: insert into device_reader(reader_name, reader_code, reader_type, ip_addr, install_position, chute_id, dept_id, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{readerName}, #{readerCode}, #{readerType}, #{ipAddr}, #{installPosition}, #{chuteId}, #{deptId}, #{status}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update:
update device_reader set del_flag = '2' where reader_id in
#{readerId}
